articles.title: The questions raised by the Murrell embezzlement controversy
articles.description: Thecase has been hanging over the SNP like a toxic cloud since the police investigation began five years ago.

articles.title: Deal with US not imminent, Iran says
articles.description: The US secretary of state earlier said that an agreement could possibly come on Monday.

articles.title: Oil prices slide on hopes of US-Iran peace deal
articles.description: Trump said on Saturday that an agreement would include the reopening of the Strait of Hormuz, without giving further details.

articles.title: Police fire shots in air to disperse angry crowds at DR Congo Ebola treatment centre
articles.description: Unrest between crowds trying to reclaim the bodies of suspected Ebola cases and authorities have continued.
